app_popup_text.message:
If you continue to see this error message
please contact us via email: $1

permissions_mouseenabletarget_text.description: We are asking user to click mouse to move a joystick. $1 is 'here' or 'again'

permissions_mouseenabletarget_text_3.description: We are asking user to click mouse to move a joystick with mouse

permissions_mouseenabletarget_desc.message: Please enable mouse lock permission in your browser settings

permissions_mouseenabletarget_text_4.message: Need help with mouse lock permission?

permissions_mouseenabletarget_here.description: Text for first click instruction - 'Click here to move...'

permissions_mouseenabletarget_again.description: Text for second click instruction - 'Click again to move...'

onboarding_paywall_headline.message: Play any Xbox Cloud game with keyboard and mouse

onboarding_paywall_feature_desc_works_ev.message: Play Fortnite, GTA, Forza Horizon, CoD, and more. No controller required.

onboarding_paywall_feature_desc_preset_l.message: Use $1 ready-to-play presets, or build your own.

onboarding_paywall_feature_desc_instant_.message: Import a preset in 1 click and start playing faster.

onboarding_paywall_feature_desc_auto_swi.message: Switch presets automatically when you launch a game.

errors_errordetails_text.message: Unable to access settings from storage

errors_errordetails_text_3.message: Please send this issue via email to $1

editor_editor_desc.message:
You may also need to change the in-game joystick
sensitivity and deadzone settings.

editor_editor_error_2.message: Please fix errors in preset before saving

editor_editor_desc_2.message: Preset name is required and must be unique

settings_settings_text.message: Position of "Click to move $1 with mouse" prompt
settings_settings_text.description: Position of 'click to move with mouse' prompt

settings_settings_title.message: Show overlay with all button bindings during gameplay

settings_settings_label_2.message: Temporarily disable preset auto-load (resets on preset switch)

settings_settings_title_2.message: When enabled, the current preset will be used even if the game is linked to a different preset

settings_translate_keys_title.message: When enabled, key names (like Space, Enter, etc.) will be translated to the selected language

settings_settings_text_4.message: For support, please contact us via email: $1

editor_keybindings_desc.message: Press any key, or click, or scroll...
editor_keybindings_desc.description: Press any keyboard key, or click mouse, or scroll the mouse wheel...

preset_newconfig_text_4.message: Name already used for another preset

preset_autoswitch_text_2.description: No games linked to this preset

preset_autoswitch_placeholder.description: Tells user to link a recently played game

preset_autoswitch_footer_no_games.message:
To link a game, play the game again
to see it in this list.

preset_autoswitch_footer_showing_games.message:
Showing your $1 most recent $2.
Don't see the game you want?
Play it again to see it in this list.

settings_shortcuts_description.message: Set keyboard shortcuts to quickly change extension settings.
settings_shortcuts_description.description: Description of what keyboard shortcuts can do

editor_stick_text_3.description: Mouse moves left/right joystick. $1 is 'left' or 'right'

app_update_desc.message: Thanks for using the extension. Here's what's new:

app_update_desc_2.message: Switch presets automatically when you launch a game.

app_update_desc_4.message: Use $1 ready-to-play presets from our website. No more searching on Discord.

app_update_desc_5.message: Import from the preset library in one click and start playing faster.

app_update_desc_6.message: A cleaner editor, better keybind conflict messages, and more usability improvements.

app_update_desc_7.message: A new dark theme to match your style.

app_update_desc_8.message: Prefer light mode? Set your browser theme to light mode.

app_update_desc_9.message: Try it by setting your browser theme to dark mode.

app_update_text_6.message: Have feedback? Send us an email: $1

app_update_version_update.description: Word 'Update' in version heading e.g. 'v4.0.5 Update'

app_update_v4patch05_desc.message: This update adds support for the new Xbox Cloud preview interface and improves overall reliability.

app_update_v4patch05_desc_1.message: Full support for the new preview interface on play.xbox.com.

app_update_v4patch05_desc_2.message: Fixes for issues that could occur when other extensions are active.

app_update_v4patch05_desc_3.message: Several fixes for the editor and in-game controls to improve reliability.

post_entitlement_variant_paid.message: All features are free and available to everyone.

notification_check_extension_headline.message:
Please check that the Keyboard & Mouse extension is enabled.
If extension is enabled, please reload this page.

notification_check_extension_small.message: If this message still appears after reloading the page, please email $1

notification_extension_updated_headline.message:
Extension updated. Please reload this page
or hold the 7 key to dismiss this message.

notification_extension_updated_small.message:
Changing presets and other functionality may not work until you reload the page.
If this message still appears after reloading the page, please email $1

notification_extension_installed_headlin.message:
Welcome to Keyboard & Mouse for Xbox xCloud!
Please reload this page to start using the Keyboard & Mouse extension.

notification_extension_installed_small.message:
Extension will not work until you reload the page.
If this message still appears after reloading the page, please email $1
